mapper.sql: semb.id, semb.work_card, semb.name, semb.bank_account, semb.bank_name, semb.department, semb.administrative_office, semb.station, semb.employee_category, semb.rank, semb.technical_rank, semb.skill_level, semb.category, semb.job, semb.position, semb.title, semb.education, semb.entry_time, semb.division_contract_flag, semb.lump_sum_wage, semb.generation_differentiation_flag, semb.base_pay, semb.post_skill_salary, semb.target_performance_pay, semb.accessment_form, semb.cost_center, semb.cost_center_num, semb.service_department, semb.squad_leader_allowance, semb.post_subsidy, semb.seniority_allowance, semb.one_child_subsidy, semb.high_temperature_subsidy, semb.safety_accumulation_award, semb.personal_deductibles, semb.company_deductibles, semb.personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, semb.company_deduct_accumulation_fund, semb.transportation_allowance, semb.bak_date, semb.attribute1, semb.attribute2, semb.attribute3, semb.attribute4, semb.create_time, semb.create_by, semb.update_time, semb.update_by, semb.pm_employee_id, semb.swm_employee_id, semb.team, semb.manager_flag, semb.income_period

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.work_card as ${tAlias}_work_card, ${tAlias}.name as ${tAlias}_name, ${tAlias}.bank_account as ${tAlias}_bank_account, ${tAlias}.bank_name as ${tAlias}_bank_name, ${tAlias}.department as ${tAlias}_department, ${tAlias}.administrative_office as ${tAlias}_administrative_office, ${tAlias}.station as ${tAlias}_station, ${tAlias}.employee_category as ${tAlias}_employee_category, ${tAlias}.rank as ${tAlias}_rank, ${tAlias}.technical_rank as ${tAlias}_technical_rank, ${tAlias}.skill_level as ${tAlias}_skill_level, ${tAlias}.category as ${tAlias}_category, ${tAlias}.job as ${tAlias}_job, ${tAlias}.position as ${tAlias}_position, ${tAlias}.title as ${tAlias}_title, ${tAlias}.education as ${tAlias}_education, ${tAlias}.entry_time as ${tAlias}_entry_time, ${tAlias}.division_contract_flag as ${tAlias}_division_contract_flag, ${tAlias}.lump_sum_wage as ${tAlias}_lump_sum_wage, ${tAlias}.generation_differentiation_flag as ${tAlias}_generation_differentiation_flag, ${tAlias}.base_pay as ${tAlias}_base_pay, ${tAlias}.post_skill_salary as ${tAlias}_post_skill_salary, ${tAlias}.target_performance_pay as ${tAlias}_target_performance_pay, ${tAlias}.accessment_form as ${tAlias}_accessment_form, ${tAlias}.cost_center as ${tAlias}_cost_center, ${tAlias}.cost_center_num as ${tAlias}_cost_center_num, ${tAlias}.service_department as ${tAlias}_service_department, ${tAlias}.squad_leader_allowance as ${tAlias}_squad_leader_allowance, ${tAlias}.post_subsidy as ${tAlias}_post_subsidy, ${tAlias}.seniority_allowance as ${tAlias}_seniority_allowance, ${tAlias}.one_child_subsidy as ${tAlias}_one_child_subsidy, ${tAlias}.high_temperature_subsidy as ${tAlias}_high_temperature_subsidy, ${tAlias}.safety_accumulation_award as ${tAlias}_safety_accumulation_award, ${tAlias}.personal_deductibles as ${tAlias}_personal_deductibles, ${tAlias}.company_deductibles as ${tAlias}_company_deductibles, ${tAlias}.personal_deduct_accumulation_fund as ${tAlias}_personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, ${tAlias}.company_deduct_accumulation_fund as ${tAlias}_company_deduct_accumulation_fund, ${tAlias}.transportation_allowance as ${tAlias}_transportation_allowance, ${tAlias}.bak_date as ${tAlias}_bak_date, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.pm_employee_id as ${tAlias}_pm_employee_id, ${tAlias}.team as ${tAlias}_team, ${tAlias}.manager_flag as ${tAlias}_manager_flag, ${tAlias}.income_period as ${tAlias}_income_period
mapper.insert: insert into swm_employee_monthly_bak (work_card, name, bank_account, bank_name, department, administrative_office, station, employee_category, rank, technical_rank, skill_level, category, job, position, title, education, entry_time, division_contract_flag, lump_sum_wage, generation_differentiation_flag, base_pay, post_skill_salary, target_performance_pay, accessment_form, cost_center, cost_center_num, service_department, squad_leader_allowance, post_subsidy, seniority_allowance, one_child_subsidy, high_temperature_subsidy, safety_accumulation_award, personal_deductibles, company_deductibles, personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, company_deduct_accumulation_fund, transportation_allowance, bak_date, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, pm_employee_id, swm_employee_id, team, manager_flag) values (#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{administrativeOffice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{station,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeCategory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rank,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{technicalRank,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{skillLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{category,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{position,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{education,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entryTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{divisionContractFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{lumpSumWage,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{generationDifferentiationFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{basePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{postSkillSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{targetPerformancePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{accessmentForm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{costCenter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{costCenterNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{serviceDepartment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{squadLeaderAllowance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{postSubsidy,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{seniorityAllowance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{oneChildSubsidy,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{highTemperatureSubsidy,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{safetyAccumulationAward,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{personalDeductibles,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{companyDeductibles,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{personalDeductAccumulationFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{companyDeductAccumulationFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{transportationAllowance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{bakDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{pmEmployeeId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{swmEmployeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{team,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{managerFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{incomePeriod,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: update swm_employee_monthly_bak set work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank_account = #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank_name = #{bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, department = #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, administrative_office = #{administrativeOffice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, station = #{station,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, employee_category = #{employeeCategory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rank = #{rank,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, technical_rank = #{technicalRank,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, skill_level = #{skillLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, category = #{category,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job = #{job,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, position = #{position,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, education = #{education,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, entry_time = #{entryTime,jdbcType=DATE}, division_contract_flag = #{divisionContractFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, lump_sum_wage = #{lumpSumWage,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, generation_differentiation_flag = #{generationDifferentiationFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, base_pay = #{basePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, post_skill_salary = #{postSkillSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, target_performance_pay = #{targetPerformancePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, accessment_form = #{accessmentForm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cost_center = #{costCenter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cost_center_num = #{costCenterNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, service_department = #{serviceDepartment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, squad_leader_allowance = #{squadLeaderAllowance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, post_subsidy = #{postSubsidy,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, seniority_allowance = #{seniorityAllowance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, one_child_subsidy = #{oneChildSubsidy,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, high_temperature_subsidy = #{highTemperatureSubsidy,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, safety_accumulation_award = #{safetyAccumulationAward,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, personal_deductibles = #{personalDeductibles,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, company_deductibles = #{companyDeductibles,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, personal_deduct_accumulation_fund = #{personalDeductAccumulationFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, company_deduct_accumulation_fund = #{companyDeductAccumulationFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, transportation_allowance = #{transportationAllowance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, bak_date = #{bakDate,jdbcType=DATE}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, pm_employee_id = #{pmEmployeeId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, swm_employee_id = #{swmEmployeeId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, team = #{team, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, manager_flag = #{managerFlag, jdbcType = BIT}, income_period = #{incomePeriod, jdbcType =VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into swm_employee_monthly_bak (work_card, name, bank_account, bank_name, department, administrative_office, station, employee_category, rank, technical_rank, skill_level, category, job, position, title, education, entry_time, division_contract_flag, lump_sum_wage, generation_differentiation_flag, base_pay, post_skill_salary, target_performance_pay, accessment_form, cost_center, cost_center_num, service_department, squad_leader_allowance, post_subsidy, seniority_allowance, one_child_subsidy, high_temperature_subsidy, safety_accumulation_award, personal_deductibles, company_deductibles, personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, company_deduct_accumulation_fund, transportation_allowance, bak_date,
create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, pm_employee_id, swm_employee_id, team, manager_flag,income_period) select se.work_card, se.name, se.bank_account, se.bank_name, se.department, se.administrative_office, se.station, se.employee_category, se.rank, se.technical_rank, se.skill_level, se.category, se.job, se.position, se.title, se.education, se.entry_time, se.division_contract_flag, se.lump_sum_wage, se.generation_differentiation_flag, se.base_pay, se.post_skill_salary, se.target_performance_pay, se.accessment_form, se.cost_center, se.cost_center_num, se.service_department, se.squad_leader_allowance, se.post_subsidy, se.seniority_allowance, se.one_child_subsidy, se.high_temperature_subsidy, se.safety_accumulation_award, se.personal_deductibles, se.company_deductibles, se.personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, se.company_deduct_accumulation_fund, se.transportation_allowance, convert(varchar(7), getdate(), 120) + '-01', getdate(), -1, getdate(), -1, se.employee_id, se.id, se.team, se.manager_flag,#{incomePeriod, jdbcType = VARCHAR} from swm_employee se where se.work_flag = 1
